ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein structure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the protein structure */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction method */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature at which the protein structure was predicted */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the protein structure */,
  "ident" REAL /* Identification of the protein structure */,
  "cov" REAL /* Coverage of the protein structure */,
  "evalue" REAL /* E-value of the protein structure */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score of the protein structure */,
  "gdt" REAL /* GDT (Global Distance Test) of the protein structure */,
  "tm_score" REAL /* TM-score (Template Modeling score) of the protein structure */,
  "protein_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein structure was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein structure was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the protein structure (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the protein structure */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the protein structure */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the protein structure data (e.g., experiment, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_protein_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_type_id") REFERENCES protein_types ("protein_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the method was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the method (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used in the method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_types" (
  "protein_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein type */,
  "protein_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein type was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the protein type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the protein type (e.g., experimental, theoretical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the protein structure */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
